scripts.library:improve: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const candidates=process.platform==='win32'?['python','py']:['python3','python']; const py=candidates.find((cmd)=>spawnSync(cmd,['--version'],{stdio:'ignore'}).status===0); if(!py){console.error('python3 or python is required'); process.exit(1)} const r=spawnSync(py,['scripts/meta-skill-studio.py','--mode','cli','--action','run-library-improvement',...process.argv.slice(1)],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1)" --
